dialogue: *a high-pitched national emergency alarm floods the control room*
That is not the missile alarm.
No. That is the country asking whether we can still do our jobs.
*London appears on the main screen, and above it, a nuclear warhead cuts through the clouds*
Smith kept the same navigation flaw. He trusted scale more than logic.
Then logic is what stops him.
Every lesson has led here: keep a path open, force the shortest route past the limit, and do it before London disappears.
Set the grid. This ends now.
